Object# FreeTrialOfferMustUsePeriodCountOfOneError

Advanced Commerce API 1.2+

```
object FreeTrialOfferMustUsePeriodCountOfOneError
```

## [Properties](/documentation/advancedcommerceapi/freetrialoffermustuseperiodcountofoneerror#properties)

`errorCode``number`

 Value: `4000223``errorMessage``string`

 Value: `Invalid request. The subscription offer configuration is invalid; free trial offers must use a period count of 1.`## [ Mentioned in ](/documentation/advancedcommerceapi/freetrialoffermustuseperiodcountofoneerror#mentions)
